name: Request Commission Statements From Maropost Commerce
body:
Why have I not received my commission statement?

Maropost Commerce does not automatically send out commissions statements with the monthly commission payments.
Commission statements are only sent sent upon request by contacting the Maropost Commerce Cloud accounts team.
The accounts team will process this request and email a statement through to you.

As a Maropost Commerce Partner, how do I receive my commission payments?

  • For instructions on how commission payments are calculated, click here.
  • For instructions on validating my commission payment method, click here.
  • For information on previous commission payments, click here.
